backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for projects, blog posts, skills, leads, testimonials, services, SEO settings, social links, and experiences, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable implementation details for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application file that configures TanStack Router with public and admin nested route layouts, lazy-loads all page components, and wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status via backend, rendering login or access-denied screens for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin management sections with active-state highlighting based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with navigation links, active social media icons fetched from the backend, a contact call-to-action, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a full-height flex layout including Navigation, Footer, and ProfileSetup components.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-route highlighting, social links, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that updates the document title and meta description based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin wrapper around useActor that exposes a typed call helper ensuring the actor is available before invoking backend functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across reloads and exposing login/logout/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including CRUD for blog posts, projects, services, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user profile/admin management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens plus reusable utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying a developer bio, stats, core values, and a link to contact, with SEO metadata for Boby Dhorajiya.
Admin page for managing blog posts with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form that auto-generates slugs from titles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards (projects, blogs, leads, etc.) and navigation cards linking to each admin management section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and a form supporting dynamic responsibility list items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page rendering an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and social links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and client-side pagination across a card-based list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting drag-and-drop reordering, image uploads, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with debounced search and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services with add, edit, and delete operations via a dialog form, debounced search, and paginated card list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with category classification, experience values, search filtering, pagination, and create/edit/delete dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search/pagination, toggle active state, and a dialog form for adding/editing links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries (author and message fields).
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as cards with title, description, and date, with loading skeletons and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that looks up a post by slug from the fetched posts list and renders its HTML content with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a lead submission form (name, email, message) and contact info cards, using the useSubmitLead mutation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, period, description, and responsibilities with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack showcase, FAQ accordion, and social links, with scroll-triggered animations and data fetched via `useGetSocialLinks`.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a home link and a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Portfolio projects page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and renders project cards with links and tech badges.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches and displays professional service offerings in a card grid, with a live search/filter input.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category and renders each skill with a progress bar representing years of experience.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches and displays client/colleague feedback in a card grid with a five-star rating display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), extended color palette using OKLCH values, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file at version 15, recording existing features, architectural notes, and the current task of removing the word 'Senior' from the Projects section.
